raw_title: ChatGPT, Generative AI, and an Epistemic Opportunity for Journalistic Authority
title_en: ChatGPT, Generative AI, and an Epistemic Opportunity for Journalistic Authority
title_zh: ChatGPT、生成式人工智能与新闻权威的认知机遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了像ChatGPT这样的生成式人工智能工具如何为新闻业带来新的机遇，帮助记者建立和维持权威地位。它讨论了人工智能如何影响新闻的可信度和公众对媒体的信任。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how generative AI tools like ChatGPT present new opportunities for journalism to build and maintain authority. It discusses how AI impacts news credibility and public trust in media.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻权威的演变，特别是人工智能技术如何重塑新闻生产、分发和可信度评估。
research_direction_en: Investigating the evolution of journalistic authority in the digital age, particularly how AI technologies reshape news production, distribution, and credibility assessment.
